purpose: M1.5 BGM for the rural Japanese summer-morning exploration scene
creationMethod: Project-original note score and deterministic procedural synthesis using Python, NumPy, SciPy, and FFmpeg
license: Project-original BokuNoJihanki asset; all rights reserved under the repository LICENSE
notes: The composition was authored specifically for BokuNoJihanki.
No field recordings, sample packs, copied game audio, or third-party stems are used.
Cicadas, birds, wind, traffic, footsteps, and UI sounds are intentionally excluded from this BGM and remain separate runtime buses.
